headline: AI Power Demand Continues to Surge: 5 Highest Yielding Utility Stocks You Can Hold for Decades
summary: AI data centers are rewriting the rules for electricity demand, and a handful of utility stocks quietly positioned at the center of this shift carry dividend yields that income investors rarely find in quality names trading at these levels.

headline: Is Edison International (EIX) Stock Outpacing Its Utilities Peers This Year?
summary: Here is how Edison International (EIX) and New Jersey Resources (NJR) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.
